8:["$","$L14",null,{"code":"# Write to scratchpad\nmem.scratchpad.write(\n  content=\"Step 1: Parse the user's request...\",\n  category=\"reasoning\",\n)\n\n# Read current scratchpad\nentries = mem.scratchpad.read()\n\n# Clear scratchpad\nmem.scratchpad.clear()\n\n# Flush insights to Working Memory\nmem.scratchpad.flush_to_working(tags=[\"insight\"])\n","language":"python"}]
